00027 #ifndef JELATINE_MEMORY_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_MEMORY_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "opcodes.h"
00033 #include "header.h"
00034 #include "java_lang_ref_WeakReference.h"
00035 
00036 
00037 // Forward declarations
00038 struct class_t;
00039 
00040 /******************************************************************************
00041  * Function prototypes                                                        *
00042  ******************************************************************************/
00043 
00044 // Gargbage collected heap management
00045 extern void gc_init(size_t);
00046 extern void gc_teardown( void );
00047 extern void gc_enable(bool);
00048 extern void gc_collect(size_t);
00049 extern size_t gc_free_memory( void );
00050 extern size_t gc_total_memory( void );
00051 
00052 // Managed allocations
00053 extern void gc_mark_potential(uintptr_t);
00054 extern void gc_mark_reference(uintptr_t);
00055 extern uintptr_t gc_new(struct class_t *);
00056 extern uintptr_t gc_new_array_nonref(array_type_t, int32_t);
00057 extern uintptr_t gc_new_array_ref(struct class_t *, int32_t);
00058 extern uintptr_t gc_new_multiarray(struct class_t *, uint8_t, jword_t *);
00059 
00060 // Finalization
00061 #if JEL_FINALIZER
00062 extern void gc_register_finalizer(uintptr_t);
00063 extern void gc_register_finalizable(uintptr_t);
00064 extern uintptr_t gc_get_finalizable( void );
00065 #endif // JEL_FINALIZER
00066 
00067 // Special references
00068 extern void gc_register_weak_ref(java_lang_ref_WeakReference_t *);
00069 
00070 // Unmanaged allocations
00071 extern void *gc_malloc(size_t);
00072 extern void *gc_palloc(size_t);
00073 extern void gc_free(void *);
00074 
00075 #endif // !JELATINE_MEMORY_H
